title: M1 substrate runtime batch — harness loop, install paths, library mode, Phoenix conformance
summary: This batch shipped the harness-loop core and the operator surfaces around it: a LangGraph-backed pipeline compiler and execution path, SDK-flagged runner invocation with manual still the default, Phoenix-only run-logger conformance, a library-mode proof, and non-destructive install paths. The review passed, and the…
archival_policy: Durable feature memory stores the compact index and machine-checkable contracts only. Full specs, plans, delivery reports, generated evidence, and run artifacts are intentionally omitted; use git history or .pan/archive paths for forensic reconstruction.
